data.title: Furniture Company Lovesac Stock Drops 20% After Lowered FY25 Outlook And Missed Q3 Revenue Estimates
data.description: Lovesac shares fall 20% after lowering its FY25 revenue and EPS outlook and missing Q3 revenue estimates.
